content.en:
"Dacheng-level Eternal Dao Body, how can it be so powerful!!!!"

The Qingyuan Kingdom Lord was shocked.

It's not that he hasn't seen some demons in the Eternal Dao Realm, but where did he encounter such a powerful one!

And in the distance.

The First Elder was shocked, Ye Tian's strength was completely beyond his imagination.

"It didn't take too long for Ye Tian to break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, it was so terrifying!"

The First Patriarch was incredulous.

"I still want to surpass Ye Tian, it's ridiculous to think about it!"

The First Patriarch said secretly.

As time passed, the Qingyuan Kingdom Lord gradually became injured.

The point is, as his injuries got worse and worse, the problems of the Eternal Dao Seed intensified.

"Run!"

The Qingyuan Kingdom Lord fled frantically, not wanting to kill Ye Tiandi.

He knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, but Ye Tian's strength was very limited compared to him, so he didn't want to kill him.

Whew!!

Ye Tian kept chasing and killing, but the first elder naturally didn't follow, he didn't dare to go over.

......

"You can't kill me, why keep chasing me!"

Qingyuan said.

"Oh, really?"

Ye Tian sneered. 053

Suddenly.

A black vine appeared on Ye Tian's body.

"Evil Vine !!!"

The Lord of Qingyuan was also well-informed, and he actually recognized this thing.

"How could you have such a thing?" he said, a look of horror.

When the Eternal Dao Realm encounters this thing, it is not ironclad to transform into a demon.

But Ye Tian was fine, and put this thing in the Eternal Dao Seed.

Well, there are only two possibilities.

The first is that the Eternal Dao Seed that Ye Tian has cultivated is a perfect Eternal Dao Seed, and the second possibility is that Ye Tian has some kind of treasure on his body, suppressing the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed.

Whatever the case, he didn't dare to stay here now.

Ye Tian is not afraid of evil vines, but he is afraid!

"Go!"

The evil vines spread, and the Qingyuan Nation Lord tried to dodge, but Ye Tian's other copy body rushed over and hit the Qingyuan Monarch's body with a blow.

After receiving this blow, the Qingyuan Kingdom Lord suddenly dodged incomparably, and was pierced through his body by the evil vines, burrowing into the Eternal Dao Seed.

With just a slight penetration, the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed of the Qingyuan Country Lord continued to intensify.

One Hit (CFAD)!

Two hits!

Under several attacks, the Qingyuan Country Lord finally couldn't bear it anymore and directly turned into a demon.

After the demon seed, the physical fitness of the Qingyuan Kingdom Lord improved, but he was unable to use the Dao Seed Secret Technique, and his strength decreased.

Thundered!!!!

Under Ye Tian's continuous siege, it took a while to finally kill the Qingyuan Country Lord.

......

When Ye Tian came back, the first elder came over to thank him again.

"Thank you, Elder Ye Tian!"

The First Elder said gratefully.

"It's just a trivial matter, the Void Domain is also my territory, and if the Lord of Qingyuan dares to make trouble, I naturally want to take action. Ye Tian said with a smile.

The First Elder hurriedly asked, "Elder Ye Tian, may I ask if the Lord of Qingyuan has escaped?"

"He's dead!"

Ye Tian said.

If not, he'd have to be scared.

Ye Tian is not afraid of the Qingyuan Lord, he is afraid!

......

"The Lord of Qingyuan is really poor!"

Ye Tian checked the items on the Qingyuan Country Lord's body and couldn't help but sigh.

However, if you think about it carefully, it is normal that the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed of the Qingyuan Country Lord is so serious, but he does not dare to go to many treasure lands, which will exacerbate the demonization of the Eternal Dao Seed, and he also has to find a way to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed and seek a glimmer of hope for a breakthrough, so it is normal that there are not many good things on his body.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian found a box, this box was made of an incomparably precious metal, this metal could even isolate his will, and it was also covered with the prohibition formed by the power of the Eternal Dao Species.

This prohibition should be arranged by the Qingyuan Lord, which is quite complicated.

Ye Tian didn't forcibly break it, for fear of damaging the items inside.

Thereupon.

He studied it slowly, and even used the ruin sun disc to deduce the prohibition above.

After a long time, he finally cracked it, and then opened the ban.

Click!

The box opened.

Ye Tian saw the contents of the box.

"A seed!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Lord of Qingyuan Country wasted so much effort to arrange the ban, and used such a precious box, but it was only a seed?

Ye Tian carefully studied this seed, and soon found that this seed was not simple, the aura contained on it was extremely pure, and extremely high-end, and even the power level of the Eternal Dao Realm was not as good as the power level of this seed.

"This seed should be incomparably valuable, even to the Qingyuan Lord. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't mess with the seed, he had to know what it was for.

"You have to get an eternal primordial treasure that can identify all things before you can identify its usefulness!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And although this kind of Eternal Primordial Treasure is rare, it still exists in the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian used many precious treasures to exchange one such eternal primordial treasure with other country lords, the Mirror of the Divine Mirror of All Things.

This Eternal Primordial Treasure can identify all things, and it should be able to identify this seed as well.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian brought this Eternal Primordial Treasure back to the Void Realm and began to identify this seed.

"Identification!"

Soon, the results came out.

The Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed, only one-tenth of the origin remains, and it needs to be watered with the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, which will damage the Eternal Dao Seed. The Eternal Realm Spirit Tree is conceived, and the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit can be born, and the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit can assist the Eternal Dao Seed to give birth to the Realm Spirit

"It's a treasure that can assist in the birth of realm spirits!"

He now knows what the Eternal Dao Birth Realm Spirit is.

Above the Eternal Dao Realm is the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, and the Eternal Realm Divine Realm not only needs to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed in the body, but when the Eternal Dao Seed is raised to a certain level, if you want to continue to break through, you have to give birth to the Realm Spirit.

And every time a realm spirit is conceived, the eternal Dao seed will be weakened.

Therefore, if the Eternal Dao Seed is not strong enough, don't forcibly give birth to the Realm Spirit, otherwise you will suck all the Eternal Dao Seed dry.

However, the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit can assist in the birth of Realm Spirits, how precious it is!

If you let the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm know, I'm afraid you will have to snatch it like crazy.

Of course.

For other Eternal Dao realms, this seed is damaged, and it needs to be watered with the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, and it will also damage the Eternal Dao Seed.

This is also the reason why the Qingyuan Country Lord did not plant this seed.

"However, it's just right for me, I can completely plant this Eternal Realm Spirit Tree seed, but if I want to cultivate it into an Eternal Realm Spirit Tree, I'm afraid it will take a long time!" Ye Tian muttered.
